title: Add Leaderboard and Anime Character Selection with Autonomous Movement

requirements.text: Add a leaderboard screen that displays the top users ranked by points, showing each user's display name, selected anime character avatar, and total points score. The leaderboard should be accessible from the bottom navigation bar with a trophy or leaderboard icon tab.

quotes: at a leader board in this

acceptanceCriteria: A leaderboard tab/icon is visible in the bottom navigation bar
The leaderboard screen displays users ranked by points in descending order
Each leaderboard entry shows the user's name, anime character avatar, and point total
The current logged-in user's entry is visually highlighted
The backend stores and exposes a query to retrieve top user scores

requirements.text: Add an anime character selection screen that allows users to choose their character from a roster of well-known characters spanning Naruto (e.g., Naruto Uzumaki, Sasuke Uchiha), One Piece (e.g., Luffy, Zoro), Bleach (e.g., Ichigo, Rukia), and Dragon Ball (e.g., Goku, Vegeta). The selected character should be saved to the user's profile and displayed on the leaderboard and throughout the app.

quotes: meet your that provide many anime characters and give the users choice to select their character from the animal likes Naruto one piece bleach and dragon Ball

acceptanceCriteria: A character selection screen is shown (e.g., after sign-up or accessible from a profile/settings area)
At least 2 characters per franchise are displayed (Naruto, One Piece, Bleach, Dragon Ball — at least 8 total)
Each character card shows the character's name, franchise badge, and a representative avatar illustration
The user can select one character and confirm their choice
The selected character is saved to the backend user profile
The selected character avatar is displayed next to the user's name in the app and on the leaderboard

requirements.text: Each anime character should have its own autonomous animated movement on screen — characters walk, run, or perform signature moves independently without any player input. When a character is active (selected by the user or displayed on a shared screen), it should animate continuously using CSS or canvas-based animations that reflect the character's style (e.g., Naruto's running pose, Goku's power-up stance).

quotes: give that character there own movement that characters should not be controlled by any person

acceptanceCriteria: Each character has a distinct looping animation (idle, walk cycle, or signature move)
Animations play automatically without any user interaction or keyboard/touch input controlling them
Characters move across or within their designated area on screen autonomously
Different characters have visually distinct movement patterns that match their franchise style
Animations are smooth and do not cause performance issues on the main app screens

requirements.text: Generate illustrated anime-style character avatars for each selectable character: Naruto Uzumaki, Sasuke Uchiha, Monkey D. Luffy, Roronoa Zoro, Ichigo Kurosaki, Rukia Kuchiki, Son Goku, and Vegeta. Each avatar should be a simple stylized bust/portrait suitable for character selection cards and leaderboard entries.

quotes: many anime characters and give the users choice to select their character from the animal likes Naruto one piece bleach and dragon Ball

acceptanceCriteria: 8 character avatar images are available as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
Each avatar is visually distinct and identifiable by franchise and character
Avatars are used in the character selection screen cards and leaderboard entries

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Character movement must be autonomous (no player keyboard/touch control)
All backend logic must remain in the single main actor file (backend/main.mo)
nonGoals: Player-controlled character movement or fighting mechanics
External anime APIs or licensed asset fetching
Changing the existing plant identification or camera scan features

required: Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a spiky blonde ninja boy with whisker marks on his cheeks and orange outfit (naruto-uzumaki-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a dark-haired ninja boy with a blue outfit and red fan symbol, cold expression (sasuke-uchiha-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a cheerful boy with a straw hat, black hair, and a red vest, wide grin with a scar under one eye (luffy-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a green-haired swordsman with three swords and a bandana, serious expression (zoro-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a spiky orange-haired teen with intense brown eyes and a black outfit (ichigo-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a short black-haired girl with large violet eyes and a black kimono-style outfit (rukia-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a spiky black-haired martial artist with a confident smile, orange gi top (goku-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
Anime-style stylized bust portrait of a flame-shaped widow's-peak dark-haired warrior with a scowl and blue battle armor (vegeta-avatar.dim_128x128.png)
